changelog.1.3.0: Major restructure: armor base_stats now uses slot.rarity.stars format (no redundant per-piece stats), added comprehensive armor_sets with all 12 set bonuses, added key_armor with unique effects only, added key_weapons with 25+ blueprint weapons including innate bonuses and damage bucket classifications
changelog.1.2.0: Comprehensive mod OCR from game screenshots: weapon mods with Factor/Final bucket classification, mask mods with Final DMG sources identified, complete armor mod descriptions with numerical values
changelog.1.1.0: Added damage_formula_system with Factor/Final bucket documentation, armor base stats, ammunition multipliers, suffix tier values
changelog.1.0.0: Initial database with weapons, mods, keywords

notes.january_2026_update: Major mod system rework on 2026-01-21: Mods now have FIXED substats instead of random rolls. Legacy mods (pre-update) retain random rolled stats.
notes.data_completeness: Some values marked as null are not publicly documented. Weapon stats can vary by tier (I-V) and calibration level.
notes.substat_system: Post-update mods have fixed substats at levels 1-17, with 'Shiny' versions at level 17 having slightly higher main stats.
notes.damage_formula_note: Keywords use two multiplicative buckets: Factor (additive within) and Final (additive within, multiplicative with Factor). See damage_formula_system for details.
notes.factor_final_summary: CONFIRMED FINAL BUCKET MODS: Break Bounce (+25% Bounce Final when target >50% HP), Frostwave Wither (+30% Frost Vortex Final, decaying), Pinpoint Strike (+35% UB Final when single target). Most other keyword DMG bonuses are Factor bucket.

helmet.name: Momentum Up
helmet.effect: First 50% of magazine: Fire Rate +10%. Next 50%: Weapon DMG +30%.

helmet.name: Fateful Strike
helmet.effect: Disables Weakspot DMG, but Crit Rate +10% and Crit DMG +30%.

helmet.name: Work Of Proficiency
helmet.effect: Reloading empty magazine: Reload Speed +10% and Elemental DMG +20% for 5s. Resets on next reload.

helmet.name: First-Move Advantage
helmet.effect: For 2s after reloading: Crit Rate +10% and Crit DMG +20%.

helmet.name: Deviation Expert
helmet.effect: Range -25%, but Fire Rate +10% and Status DMG +20%.

helmet.name: Precise Strike
helmet.effect: Weakspot hit: Weakspot DMG +12% for 3s, stacks up to 3 times.

helmet.name: Mag Expansion
helmet.effect: Reloading empty magazine increases capacity by 30%.

helmet.name: Elemental Havoc
helmet.effect: Elemental DMG +10%. When HP above 90%, additional +10% Elemental DMG.

top.name: Resist Advantage
top.effect: DMG Reduction +10% when enemies within 7m. Taking melee DMG grants additional +10% DMG Reduction for 5s.

top.name: Head Guard
top.effect: When HP above 70%, head is no longer a Weakspot.

top.name: Critical Rescue
top.effect: When HP drops below 30%: DMG Reduction +20% and Healing Received +20%.

top.name: Rejuvenating
top.effect: Using healing shot: Movement Speed +20% for 2s and fully refills magazine from inventory (up to 100%).

top.name: Quick Comeback
top.effect: When HP above 70%: Healing from all sources +25%.

top.name: Enduring Shield
top.effect: Out of combat: Gain 1 stack of Safe Haven every 5s (max 5). Every 5 hits received consumes 1 stack for 8% HP shield for 3s.

top.name: Head-on Conflict
top.effect: Enemies within 7m: DMG Reduction +10%. Taking melee DMG: additional +10% DMG Reduction for 5s.

top.name: Healing Fortification
top.effect: When using healing shot: DMG Reduction +40% for 2s.

top.name: Status Immune
top.effect: When HP falls below 60%: All negative Deviated states purged. 15s cooldown.

bottoms.name: Precision Charge
bottoms.effect: Per 10% Weakspot hit percentage from last magazine: Elemental DMG +4% for 10s (max 24%). Resets on reload.

bottoms.name: Unstoppable
bottoms.effect: Hitting enemy from 20m+: Weakspot DMG +10%. Each additional meter beyond 20: +1% Weakspot DMG (max 20%).

bottoms.name: Melee Momentum
bottoms.effect: Melee DMG +20%. Melee kill restores 30% Max Stamina.

bottoms.name: Status Amplification
bottoms.effect: When magazine empty: Status DMG +10% for 12s, stacks up to 3 times.

bottoms.name: Bullet Siphon
bottoms.effect: Weapon DMG +5%. Per 5 rounds missing from magazine: Weapon DMG +4% (max 20%). Resets on reload.

bottoms.name: Three Strikes
bottoms.effect: First 3 hits after reloading (not exceeding 50% mag capacity): Weakspot DMG +30%.

bottoms.name: Reload Rampage
bottoms.effect: Reloading grants Weapon DMG +5%. Per 5 bullets consumed: Weapon DMG +4% (max 20%).

bottoms.name: Deadshot
bottoms.effect: Each Crit hit with non-melee weapon: Crit DMG +5%, stacks up to 45%. Removed on reload.

shoes.name: Slow and Steady
shoes.effect: Melee/Weapon/Status DMG +10%. When HP above 90%: additional +10%.

shoes.name: Covered Advance
shoes.effect: Taking no damage for 4s: Melee/Weapon/Status DMG +20% for 30s.

shoes.name: Secluded Strike
shoes.effect: No enemies within 7m: Weapon DMG and Status DMG +15%.

shoes.name: Ferocious Charge
shoes.effect: Killing enemy within 10m: Melee/Weapon/Status DMG +20% for 8s.

shoes.name: Rush Hour
shoes.effect: Per 10% decrease in HP: Melee/Weapon/Status DMG +4%.

shoes.name: Ruthless Reaper
shoes.effect: After 2 enemy kills: Magazine refilled from reserves without reloading.

gloves.name: Elemental Amplifier
gloves.effect: Reloading empty magazine: Status DMG +10% for 12s, stacks up to 3 times.

universal.name: Flame Resonance
universal.effect: Max Burn stacks +2, but Burn duration -20%.

universal.name: Weakspot DMG Boost
universal.effect: Increases damage dealt to enemy Weakspots.

weapon_mods._documentation: Weapon mods organized by keyword. Slot indicates gear type (Weapon = weapon mod slot). damage_bucket indicates Factor vs Final classification where known.

burn.name: Burning Wrath
burn.effect: Triggering Burn has a 25% chance to grant +1 Burn stacks.

burn.name: Flame Resonance
burn.notes: Tradeoff mod - more stacks but shorter duration

burn.name: Blaze Blessing
burn.effect: When defeating an enemy affected by Burn, recover 5% HP.

burn.name: Embers
burn.effect: When Burn is removed, stacks only -50%.
burn.notes: Sustain mod - preserves half stacks on expiry

frost_vortex.name: Frosty Blessing
frost_vortex.effect: When Frost Vortex disappears, restore 10% of HP.

frost_vortex.name: Cryo Catalyst
frost_vortex.effect: Frost Vortex DMG +10%. After triggering Frost Construct (Ice Spike, Ice Missile, Ice Crystal) Frost Vortex DMG +5%.

frost_vortex.name: Shattering Ice
frost_vortex.effect: When an enemy at the center of the Frost Vortex is defeated, deal 50% Psi Intensity Ice DMG to enemies within 1m 1 time.

frost_vortex.name: Cryo Blast
frost_vortex.effect: After triggering a Frost Vortex, Frost Vortex DMG +4% for 4s. Up to 5 stacks (20% total).

power_surge.name: Surge Amplifier
power_surge.effect: Dealing Power Surge DMG grants Power Surge DMG +5% for 3s, up to 4 stack(s).

power_surge.name: Static Shock
power_surge.effect: Power Surge Status duration -50%. Power Surge DMG +20%.

power_surge.name: Shock Diffusion
power_surge.effect: When triggering Power Surge, apply the Power Surge status to 1 enemy within 10m of the target (prioritizes enemies that are not affected by Power Surge status).

power_surge.name: Shock Rampage
power_surge.effect: Dealing Power Surge DMG grants +5% Power Surge Trigger Chance (based on weapon's Trigger Chance) for 5s. Effect can stack up to 4 times.

unstable_bomber.name: Heavy Explosives
unstable_bomber.effect: Unstable Bomber inflicts stagger on enemies and deals 40% less damage to you.

unstable_bomber.name: Bombardier Souvenir
unstable_bomber.effect: When triggering Unstable Bomber, automatically refill 10% of your magazine.

unstable_bomber.name: Reckless Bomber
unstable_bomber.effect: For every 1% Crit Rate, Unstable Bomber DMG +0.5%.

unstable_bomber.name: Super Charged
unstable_bomber.effect: Triggering Unstable Bomber grants Unstable Bomber DMG +5% for 3s. Effect can stack up to 6 times.

shrapnel.name: Shield Breaker
shrapnel.effect: When hitting a shielded enemy, Shrapnel DMG +60% for 1s.

shrapnel.name: Shrapnel Souvenir
shrapnel.effect: When Shrapnel hits a Weakspot, automatically refills 1 bullet from inventory.

shrapnel.name: Shatter Them All
shrapnel.effect: The more parts the Shrapnel hits, the higher the Shrapnel DMG. Each part +15%. Up to 45%.

shrapnel.name: Shrapnel Smash
shrapnel.effect: Triggering Shrapnel grants +1.0% Shrapnel Crit Rate for 2 seconds, up to 20 stacks.

fast_gunner.name: Cowboy
fast_gunner.effect: After reloading when the magazine is empty, Fast Gunner trigger chance +100% (based on the weapon's Trigger Chance) for 5s. When Fast Gunner reaches max stacks, the duration is increased by 5s.

fast_gunner.name: Shoot Out
fast_gunner.effect: When triggering Fast Gunner, Weapon DMG +1.5% for 10s, up to 20 stack(s).
fast_gunner.notes: Provides Weapon DMG, not Fast Gunner-specific DMG

fast_gunner.name: Precision Rush
fast_gunner.effect: When Fast Gunner is active, increase Weakspot DMG while continuously shooting for 3s, up to 45%.

bulls_eye.name: Recover Mark
bulls_eye.effect: When defeating marked enemies, recover 15% HP and 25% Stamina.

bulls_eye.name: Hunter's Perk
bulls_eye.notes: Defensive mod - reduces damage from marked enemies

bulls_eye.name: Vulnerability Amplifier
bulls_eye.notes: Stacks with base 8% vulnerability for 16% total

bulls_eye.name: Spreading Marks
bulls_eye.effect: When a marked enemy is defeated, The Bull's Eye will spread to 1 enemies within 15m.

fortress_warfare.name: United We Stand
fortress_warfare.effect: The more players inside the Fortress Warfare, the greater the Weapon DMG bonus, up to 40%.

fortress_warfare.name: Final Territory
fortress_warfare.effect: When Fortress Warfare ends, Weapon DMG +10%, Movement Speed +10% for 10s.

fortress_warfare.name: Durable Territory
fortress_warfare.effect: Every enemy defeated while in Fortress Warfare state will extend the effect by 5s (up to 5 times for every Fortress Warfare).

fortress_warfare.name: Portable Territory
fortress_warfare.effect: After leaving Fortress Warfare, the status will remain for 2s.

bounce.name: Multi Bounce
bounce.effect: The more Bounces, the higher the damage, up to +45% (7.5% per Bounce).

bounce.name: Bounce Rampage
bounce.effect: The more selectable targets Bounce has, the higher the Bounce DMG, up to 45% (15% per target).

bounce.name: Boomerang Bullet
bounce.effect: Each time Bounce deals damage, its trigger chance +2% (based on the weapon's trigger chance), lasting 5s and stacking up to 10 times.

bounce.name: Super Bullet
bounce.effect: Bounce Crit Rate +10%, Bounce Crit DMG +25%.

mask_mods._documentation: Mask slot armor mods. Often provide keyword-specific enhancements with Final DMG multipliers.

burn.name: Retrusion Explosion
burn.effect: When hitting Burning enemies, Crit Rate +8%, and Crit DMG +20%.

burn.name: Blaze Amplifier
burn.effect: Every stack of Burn grants +3% Psi Intensity DMG.
burn.notes: Scales with Burn stacks, affects PSI-based damage

frost_vortex.name: Frost Construct
frost_vortex.effect: Frost Constructs (Ice Spikes, Ice Missiles, Ice Crystals) deal +10% damage; if the target is in Frost Vortex status, damage dealt +10%.

frost_vortex.name: Frostwave Wither
frost_vortex.effect: Frost Vortex's Final DMG +30%, decreasing by 8% every second overtime.

unstable_bomber.name: Pinpoint Strike
unstable_bomber.effect: When Unstable Bomber hits only one enemy, Unstable Bomber Final DMG +35%.
unstable_bomber.notes: CONFIRMED FINAL BUCKET - conditional single-target bonus

unstable_bomber.name: Delayed Blast
unstable_bomber.effect: Before the bomb explodes, for every 5 hits taken, the bomb's Ultimate DMG +25%.
unstable_bomber.notes: Ultimate DMG terminology - likely Factor bucket

shrapnel.name: Explosive Shrapnel
shrapnel.effect: The 20th Shrapnel is explosive and deals +300% DMG with guaranteed critical hit.

shrapnel.name: Shrapnel Carnage
shrapnel.effect: The chance of Shrapnel hitting Weakspots is increased by 100.0%, with Weakspot DMG +25.0%.

power_surge.name: Thunderclap
power_surge.effect: After triggering Power Surge 20 times, the next hit summons Celestial Thunder (Shock DMG of 200% PSI Intensity).

power_surge.name: First Electrocution
power_surge.effect: For enemies without Power Surge status, Power Surge's Ultimate DMG +35%. Other plays will not affect Surge Status.

fast_gunner.name: Explosive Barrage
fast_gunner.effect: When in Fast Gunner state, Crit Rate +10%, and Weapon DMG +10%.

fast_gunner.name: Blitzkrieg
fast_gunner.effect: Fast Gunner stacks +5 and additional Fire Rate +1% for each stack.

bulls_eye.name: Targeted Strike
bulls_eye.effect: When hitting marked enemies, Crit Rate +10%, and Crit DMG 25%.

bulls_eye.name: Most Wanted
bulls_eye.effect: Every time an enemy is marked, Attack +5% for 8s. Effect can stack up to 3 times.

fortress_warfare.name: Light Cannon
fortress_warfare.effect: No Super Armor inside Fortress Warfare. While in Fortress Warfare state, Attack +12%.

fortress_warfare.name: Unbreakable
fortress_warfare.effect: Fortress Warfare range -30%. While in Fortress Warfare state, Attack +15%.

bounce.name: Precision Bounce
bounce.effect: After triggering Bounce 6 times, the next bullet's Bounce DMG +125%.

bounce.name: Break Bounce
bounce.effect: When Bounce hits an enemy with HP above 50%, final Bounce DMG +25%.

substats.note: Post January 2026 update: Mods have FIXED substats at specific levels (1-17). Legacy mods retain random rolled values.

suffix_tier_values._documentation: Suffix determines the FIRST substat on a mod. Values scale by rarity tier.

deviant_energy.notes: Variants include Wild, Mirror, Phantasmal with conditional bonuses

burn.notes: Two Burn suffix pieces = +12% total burn chance

weakspot_dmg_percent.description: Increases damage to enemy weak points

elemental_dmg_percent.description: Increases elemental damage (Burn, Frost, Shock, Blast)

status_dmg_percent.description: Increases damage from status effects (PSI-based keywords)
status_dmg_percent.notes: Affects Burn, Frost Vortex, Power Surge, Unstable Bomber

armor._documentation: Post-2.3.1: Calibration system removed. Stats determined by rarity and star level (enhancement). All pieces of same slot/rarity/stars share identical base stats regardless of set or specific piece name.

base_stats._note: Values shown are Tier V (max tier). Key = star level (1-6 for enhancement). Access as: armor.base_stats.{slot}.{rarity}.{stars}

mod_slots._documentation: Each armor piece has ONE armor mod slot. Weapon mods are separate and go on weapons only.

armor_sets._documentation: Set bonuses activate at 4 pieces equipped. All sets require (0/4) pieces as shown in-game.

3.effect: After landing 2 critical weapon hits, gain 1 stack of Lone Shadow. Lone Shadow grants Crit DMG +6% for 30s. Max stacks: 8.

4.effect: Increase max Lone Shadow stacks to 10. Crit Rate +8% for 2s after reloading.

2.effect: While shielded, Weapon DMG and Status DMG dealt increases by +10%.

3.effect: Consumes 8% of current HP upon hit to generate a temporary shield equal to 5% of Max HP, lasting 30s (Cooldown: 0.5s). When shield exceeds 40%, hits landed will refresh shield duration and damage boost timer without deducting HP. When HP is consumed, Weapon and Status DMG +5%, stacking up to 4 stack(s), lasting 12s.

4.effect: Automatically uses the least potent treatment in the backpack when HP is below 30% (Cooldown: 40s).

2.effect: When HP is below 70%, weapon and Status DMG +12%.

3.effect: The HP reduction from low Sanity is decreased by 40%. Weapon and Status DMG +10% and further increases as your Sanity drops, up to +28% at 30% max Sanity.

4.effect: Generates a shield equal to 20% of Max HP when HP is below 40% of the Max. Cooldown: 8s.

3.effect: Gain 1 stack of Archer's Focus upon hitting the same enemy consecutively. Archer's Focus: Weakspot DMG +4%, stacking up to 10 stacks. Archer's Focus stacks are halved upon changing targets.

4.effect: When reloading, for every 1% of weakspot hit from the previous magazine, load an extra 0.6% bullets, up to 30%.

3.effect: Each weapon hit grants 1 stack of Deviant Energy. Every stack grants +1% Elemental DMG (Blaze, Frost, Shock, Flammable). Effect can stack up to 20 stacks. Reloading removes half of the total stacks.

4.effect: Increase max Deviant Energy stack by 10. Grant 2 additional stacks when hitting a weakspot.

1.effect: Weapon DMG +10% when HP is above 70%.

3.effect: Stay crouched and immobile for 0.5s to enter the Bastille state. While in the Bastille state, gain Weapon DMG +40%. After exiting the Bastille state, you cannot sprint and your Stamina consumption is increased by +100% for 3s.

4.effect: 3s after exiting Bastille state, gain 1 stack of Armor per second, up to 60 stacks. While in Bastille state, each stack of Armor provides a Shield equal to 1% of max HP.

3.effect: Taking DMG grants a stack of Powered Armor, DMG Reduction +4% for 10s. Effect can stack up to 6 stacks.

4.effect: Rolling consumes 3 stacks of Powered Armor and triggers an explosion that knocks back surrounding enemies. For each enemy hit, HP +5%, up to +20% (cooldown: 10s).

3.effect: Gain Bullet Saver effect with every precise kill, Weakspot DMG +15% for 8s. Effect can stack up to 3 stacks.

4.effect: Reload Efficiency +20% after defeating a target. Fire Rate +10% when killing with a Weakspot hit. Effect removed when reloading or switching weapons.

3.effect: After killing an enemy, increase Movement Speed by 20% for 2s and Elemental DMG (Blaze, Frost, Shock, Blast) by 40%, decay over 8s.

4.effect: Within 5m, each enemy grants you DMG Reduction +4%. Effect can stack up to 4 stacks.

3.effect: When Stamina is above 90%, Crit Rate +5%, Crit DMG +20%.

4.effect: Max Stamina +25. Recover 30 Stamina instantly with a kill.

2.effect: Melee, Status, and Weapon DMG +8% when a ally player is within 10 meters or within allied Territory.

3.effect: When you are within allied territory and help defeat an enemy, Melee, Status, and Weapon DMG +8% for 10 seconds, stacking up to 3 stacks.

4.effect: When within allied territory, sentry turrets within a 7-meter radius deal +50% more DMG.

1.effect: Using ultimate grants 10% temporary Shield for 10 seconds.

2.effect: When Deviant Power is not full, Weapon and Status DMG +12%.

3.effect: For every 1 Energy consumed, gain +0.6%, up to +30%.

4.effect: Consumes 30 Deviant Power when using Battle Skill, reduces cooldown by 50%.

key_armor._documentation: Key Armor pieces have unique effects beyond standard armor. Only 1 equippable per loadout. Obtained from Wish Machine or special sources. Base stats follow general armor rules (see armor.base_stats) - only unique effects listed here.

masks.name: Oasis Mask FRAG
unique_effects: Fast Gunner max stacks 10
Attack +1% per stack

masks.name: Dust Mask
unique_effects: When triggering Fast Gunner, there is a 70% chance to automatically reload 1 bullet(s) with Attack +20%

masks.name: Gas-tight Helmet
unique_effects: Limit the maximum hit parts of Shrapnel to 1
Shrapnel DMG Coefficient +150%
masks.notes: THE GASTON HELMET - Confirmed +150% is a separate Final multiplier

masks.name: Cage Helmet B.P.
unique_effects: When triggering Shrapnel, additionally triggers 1 times

masks.name: Viper Mask B.P.
unique_effects: Unstable Bomber's range +50%
For every 2% Unstable Bomber range bonus, Unstable Bomber DMG coefficient +1%

masks.name: Gas Mask Hood B.P.
unique_effects: After triggering Power Surge, Crit Rate +35%, Power Surge DMG Coefficient +15%, lasting 6s

masks.name: Yellow Paint Mask B.P.
unique_effects: Defeating enemies will generate EMP, dealing Power Surge 1 time to enemies in the area

masks.name: Beret B.P.
unique_effects: Shrapnel hit parts +1

masks.name: Mayfly Goggles B.P.
unique_effects: When triggering Power Surge, additionally triggers 1 times
Power Surge DMG Coefficient -30%
masks.notes: Tradeoff: more procs but less damage per proc

tops.name: Charmed Mag Top B.P.
unique_effects: When in Fast Gunner status, the lower the Player's current ammo, the higher the chance to trigger an extra bullet when firing. Maximum chance is 40%

tops.name: Explosive Front Top B.P.
unique_effects: Unstable Bomber detonation delay +0.3s
Unstable Bomber DMG multiplier +30%

tops.name: Snowdrift Top B.P.
unique_effects: When picking up Deviant Particles, gains an additional charge stack, and Weapon and Status DMG +25% for 25s

tops.name: Covert Walker Shirt B.P.
unique_effects: Frost Vortex collapses in the center, continuously pulling enemies within 1.5x the range of Frost Vortex (now pulls Players instead of applying strong control effects)

tops.name: Shaman Vulture Top B.P.
unique_effects: After triggering Unstable Bomber, Crit Rate +35% for 3s

tops.name: Sleek Leather Jacket B.P.
unique_effects: For every 1m distance between the Player and the Unstable Bomber trigger point, Unstable Bomber Final DMG +2%
tops.notes: CONFIRMED FINAL BUCKET - scales with distance

tops.name: Frost Tactical Vest B.P.
unique_effects: When Frost Vortex is created, additional Ice Spikes are generated, dealing Frost DMG equal to 120% Psi Intensity within a certain area

tops.name: Doyen's Cloak FRAG
unique_effects: When the Frozen effect on an objective ends, it takes Frost DMG equal to 50% of the total DMG dealt to it during the Frozen duration

bottoms.name: Overloaded Pants B.P.
unique_effects: After triggering Power Surge for 20 time(s), the next 6 shot(s) will consume reserve ammo directly, and Shock Elemental DMG +20%. Cooldown: 4s
Triggering Power Surge during the cooldown does not count toward this effect

bottoms.name: Sharp Blade Pants B.P.
unique_effects: When triggering Bounce, additionally trigger 1 more times

bottoms.name: Hot Dog Shorts B.P.
unique_effects: Bounce Count +2

bottoms.name: Tattoo Pants B.P.
unique_effects: Bounce can hit allies without dealing DMG, with a 70% chance to automatically refill 1 bullet(s)

gloves.name: Gilded Gloves
unique_effects: Unlocks the Crit Hit ability for Burn (can utilize character's Crit Rate)
Burn Crit DMG +20%

gloves.name: Hardy Gloves B.P.
unique_effects: When Burn reaches max stacks, remove Burn and trigger an Explosion, dealing 300% Hyper-sensitive Blaze DMG in a small area

gloves.name: BBQ Gloves B.P.
unique_effects: Gain Burn frequency increase based on Burn stacks, up to 100%

shoes.name: Fire Rune Boots B.P.
unique_effects: When any target nearby is inflicted with Burn, there's a 50% chance to generate a Deviant Particle. Picking it up increases Blaze DMG +30% for 15s

shoes.name: Hard Tactical Boots FRAG
unique_effects: Automatically refill 1 bullet(s) and Fire Rate +15% while in Fortress Warfare

shoes.name: Bloodstained Tracker Boots B.P.
unique_effects: When applying The Bull's Eye to an objective already marked by The Bull's Eye, your Attack +20% for 5s, and The Bull's Eye spreads to one other nearby objective

shoes.name: Leather Boots B.P.
unique_effects: Recover 2.5% HP per second and recovery doubles when HP is below 50% while in Fortress Warfare

shoes.name: Earthly Boots B.P.
unique_effects: Additional DMG +30% to enemies under The Bull's Eye

shoes.name: Cowboy Boots B.P.
unique_effects: Fortress Warfare only affects self
When in Fortress Warfare, Attack +25%

shoes.name: Tactical Combat Shoes B.P.
unique_effects: When hitting a target marked by The Bull's Eye, there is a 40% chance to automatically refill 1 bullet(s) and restore 1% of lost HP

shoes.name: Old Huntsman Boots B.P.
unique_effects: After marking the objective with The Bull's Eye, the next 1 bullet(s) hitting a marked target will count as Weakspot hits
Weakspot DMG +30% to enemies affected by The Bull's Eye

shoes.name: Pivot Step Leather Boots
unique_effects: Resets Battle Skill cooldown after using Deviation Ultimate

weapons._documentation: Blueprint weapons with unique keyword mechanics. Stats shown are Tier V, 1-star. Base stats follow weapon type rules. Innate bonuses listed are weapon-specific (only some are added, most need to be extracted from textual context of unique_effects).

crossbows.name: Critical Pulse B.P.
unique_effects: When the gun hits, it applies continuous Power Surge to the target, with a 70% chance to generate Deviant Particles near the player (pick them up to enter a Charging state)
Continuous Power Surge triggers Power Surgeon the current target every 0.5s. Higher stacks reduce the trigger interval (minimum 0.26s), lasting 3s, stacking up to 5 stacks (40% DMG against Metas)

When the gun hits, it consumes one charge to deal Shock Element Status DMG of 75% Psi Intensity to targets within 5m every 0.5s for 3s (benefits from Power Surge DMG bonus). This damage has a 5% chance to generate Deviant Particles (25% DMG against Metas)

crossbows.name: Compound Bow B.P.
unique_effects: Hitting a target grants a buff, increasing Crit Rate +40% for 5s. Cooldown: 10s. Switching weapons removes the buff
When a weapon shot crits, triggers Unstable Bomber, and the bomb can crit (using the character's Crit Rate)
Unstable Bomber DMG +30%

sniper_rifles.name: HAMR - Brahminy B.P.
unique_effects: When the weapon hits a target, there is a 75% chance to trigger Bounce (dealing 35% Bounce DMG to Metas)
Bounce count +2
Unlocks the hitting scene to trigger Bounce ability, with DMG reduced by 30% (reduced by 95% if the target is a Meta)
Bounce weakspot weight +100%

sniper_rifles.name: AWS.338 - Bullseye B.P.
unique_effects: When hitting a Weakspot with a weapon, there is a 70% chance to apply The Bull's Eye to the target. Within 8 meters, this chance increases to 80%
After switching weapons, the first weapon hit will apply The Bull's Eye to the target
After hitting a non-Meta-Human unit with a weapon, Weakspot DMG +25% for 10 seconds, stacking up to 4 stacks. Switching weapons removes half the stacks
After defeating a non-Meta-Human unit with a Weakspot shot, Attack +15% for 20 seconds

sniper_rifles.name: SKS - Pathfinder B.P.
unique_effects: When the weapon hits a target, triggers Frost Vortex, cooldown 5s, each hit reduces cooldown by 1s
60% chance to generate Deviant Particles (picking them up enters Charging state), max Charging state stacks +10

Can consume charges for a charged shot, firing a penetrating ice spike dealing damage equal to 110% of Attack as Frost Elemental Status DMG (benefits from Frost Vortex DMG Boost, deals 20% Frost Vortex Elemental DMG to Metas)
Frost Elemental DMG +30%, after a charged shot, Frost Elemental DMG increases by 8%, lasting 15s, stacks up to 3 stacks

sniper_rifles.name: EBR-14: Octopus! Grilled Rings!
unique_effects: When the weapon hits a target, 50% chance to apply burn to target
At max stacks, Burn targets generate a fire ring, spreading Burn DMG to enemies within 6 meters at Burn frequency
Burn DMG +75%, max Burn stacks -3
Burn crit rate and Burn crit DMG +20%

smgs.name: MPS5: Primal Rage
unique_effects: When a weapon hits a target, there is a 35% chance to trigger Fast Gunner
Consuming 1% of max HP. When the current magazine has 1 bullets remaining, shoot reserve ammo (non-lethal)
When a weapon hits a target, restore 0.1% Fast Gunner stacks of lost HP
When HP changes by 1%, weapon DMG increases by +1% for 5 seconds. Each stack has an independent timer and can stack up to 80 stacks

smgs.name: PDW90: Holographic Resonance
unique_effects: On hit, 20% chance to apply The Bull's Eye
Every 12 hits, triggers AoE DMG dealing Weapon DMG equal to 800% attack to enemies within an 8000m radius (damage against Metas 30%)
When hitting targets with The Bull's Eye with AoE DMG, reloads 3% ammo, up to 15% per instance
Crit Rate +20% against targets under The Bull's Eye status

smgs.name: KV-SBR: Little Jaws
unique_effects: When the weapon hits, it triggers Unstable Bomber, with a 0.9s cooldown (deals 40% damage against Meta-Humans)
Unstable Bomber delay +0.2s
Each time an enemy affected by Unstable Bomber is hit, the current Unstable Bomber Final DMG +20%
For every +0.1s of Unstable Bomber delay, Unstable Bomber DMG +15%
smgs.damage_bucket_notes: CONFIRMED FINAL BUCKET: +20% per hit is Final DMG

smgs.name: MPS7: Outer Space
unique_effects: When the weapon hits, there is a 30% chance to apply Power Surge to the target
Upon hitting a target affected by Power Surge 12 time(s), summon lightning at the target's location, dealing 500% Shock Elemental DMG based on Psi Intensity (40% DMG against Meta-Humans)
After reloading, the weapon gains a Power Surge bonus +40% for 8 seconds

smgs.name: MPS5: Kumawink
unique_effects: When the weapon hits a target, there is a 25% chance to trigger Bounce
When Bounce hits, triggers a ricochet, dealing 100% of Bounce damage to the target that triggered Bounce
After reloading, can additionally trigger 1 instances of Bounce when Bounce is activated, lasting 6 seconds. Removed upon weapon swap
Bounce damage multiplier +75%, single Bounce target +3

smgs.name: TEC9: Additional Rules
unique_effects: When shooting hits a target, trigger Fortress Warfare, with a cooldown of 10 seconds
After using Deviant skill, bullets deal 120% Attack as Elemental Status DMG (type depends on the Deviation)
Reloading an empty magazine restores 25% magazine capacity as Deviant Power, up to a maximum of 20 points per reload
In Fortress state, Crit Rate +15%

lmgs.name: KVD: Boom! Boom!
unique_effects: When the weapon hits, 18% chance to apply Burn to the target
When hitting a target, it triggers an explosion, dealing 300% Psi Intensity Blaze DMG to enemies within a 5 meter radius of the target, with a cooldown of 2 seconds (deals 40% DMG to Meta-Humans)
This explosion will apply 1 stack(s) of Burn to non-Meta-Human units

lmgs.name: MG4: Conflicting Memories
unique_effects: Trigger Shrapnel after hitting the target 12 time(s) (deals 60% Shrapnel DMG to Metas)
For every 25 rounds in the magazine, Shrapnel triggers on 1 additional body part(s), up to 6
If magazine capacity exceeds 90 rounds, for every additional 15 rounds, Shrapnel multiplier +10%
Magazine capacity +40

shotguns.name: ACS12: Corrosion B.P.
unique_effects: When a weapon hits, there is a 80% chance to trigger Power Surge, but it will no longer inflict Power Surge status on non-Meta-Human units
Unlocks the ability for Power Surge to deal Crit Hits, Power Surge Crit Rate +25% (stacks with character Crit Rate)
After triggering Power Surge against non-Meta-Human units, Power Surge Crit DMG +40% for 6 seconds, stackable up to 5 times
Power Surge DMG Factor +15%

shotguns.name: DBSG: Doombringer
unique_effects: When the weapon hits, there is a 30% chance to apply The Bull's Eye to the target. Within 8 meters, this chance increases to 80%
When all bullets hit a non-Metas unit under The Bull's Eye status, Attack +12%, Reload Efficiency +8% for 15 seconds, stackable up to 3 layers
After applying The Bull's Eye to the target, DMG Reduction +5% for 8 seconds, stackable up to 4 layers
For targets under The Bull's Eye status, Crit Rate +30%

shotguns.name: ACS12: Pyroclasm Starter
unique_effects: When the weapon hits a target, 27% chance to apply Burn to the objective
When the weapon hits a target, 20% chance to generate a Deviant Particle nearby (picking it up enters Charging state, lasting 60 seconds)
When reloading, consumes all Charges and replaces ammunition with Dragon's Breath Rounds: Deals Blaze Elemental Status DMG equal to 95% of Attack (Burn DMG bonus applies)
Blaze DMG +20%, gains additional increase when consuming Charges, +8% per stack, stackable up to 4 stacks until next reload

assault_rifles.name: M416: Silent Anabasis
unique_effects: When the weapon hits, there is a 12% chance to trigger Frost Vortex

When the weapon hits, it generates Ice Crystals with a cooldown of 1.5 seconds. The Ice Crystals last for 15 seconds (Ice Crystals deal 40% damage to Metas). Upon expiration, the Ice Crystals explode, dealing 100% Psi Intensity as Frost Vortex damage to nearby objectives
Hitting an Ice Crystal with a weapon causes it to detonate prematurely, increasing the damage multiplier from 100% to 350%
Frost Elemental DMG +30%. For each Ice Crystal shattered, Frost Elemental DMG gains an additional +8%, lasting 15 seconds, stacking up to 3 stacks

assault_rifles.name: KAM: Abyss Glance
unique_effects: When a weapon hits, trigger Frost Vortex with a cooldown of 7 seconds (Vortex triggered on Metas deals 30% damage)
When a weapon hits, Frost Vortex cooldown reduction 0.5 seconds
Hitting non-Metas units within Frost Vortex increases the final damage of Frost Vortex created by yourself by +5%, up to 10 stacks
Frost Elemental DMG +30%, Frost Vortex damage frequency +100%
assault_rifles.damage_bucket_notes: CONFIRMED FINAL: +5% per hit is Final DMG on Frost Vortex

assault_rifles.name: SOCR: The Last Valor
unique_effects: Trigger Shrapnel after hitting the target 12 time(s) (deals 60% Shrapnel DMG to Metas)
For every 25 rounds in the magazine, the first weapon hit will apply The Bull's Eye to the target
Hitting 4 times with the weapon triggers Shrapnel. When a weapon shot crits, it counts as 2 hits
After a Crit Hit, triggering Shrapnel will additionally trigger 1 times, lasting 1s
Shrapnel Crit DMG +30%

pistols.name: DE.50: Jaws
unique_effects: Every 3 weapon hits trigger Unstable Bomber. When a weapon shot crits, it counts as 2 hits
When a weapon shot crits, there is a 30% chance to trigger Unstable Bomber
Unlocks the crit capability for Unstable Bomber, increasing its Crit Rate by +35% (stacks with character's Crit Rate)

pistols.name: G17: Hazardous Object
unique_effects: Hitting enemies grants a 20% chance to trigger Unstable Bomber

Reload action is replaced by throwing your weapon, consuming all ammo to deal Unstable Bomber DMG in a 3m radius (50% + consumed ammo × 18% of Psi Intensity, capping at 480%, dealing 28% DMG against Meta-Humans)
Throwing the weapon grants 75% chance to recover 75% of consumed ammo, 25% chance to recover 25% of consumed ammo
Unstable Bomber DMG and Range +10% for 10s each time Unstable Bomber deals damage, stacking up to 5 stacks

ammunition._documentation: Ammo tier affects base damage and PSI intensity multipliers

_documentation.WARNING: UNCERTAIN how accurate these representative formulas are. Take with grain of salt and validate yourself.
_documentation.overview: Once Human uses a two-bucket multiplicative system for keyword damage. Each keyword has its own Factor and Final buckets that multiply separately.
_documentation.formula_template: Base × (1 + Σ Factor_bonuses) × (1 + Σ Final_bonuses) × (other multipliers)

factor_vs_final.factor_bucket: Additive WITHIN bucket. Multiple +10% Factor bonuses = +20% total Factor. Common sources: keyword suffix mods, food buffs, some weapon innates.
factor_vs_final.final_bucket: Additive WITHIN bucket, but MULTIPLICATIVE with Factor bucket. Rarer, typically from specific mods like 'Chain Bounce' or deviation skills. Higher marginal value when Factor is already stacked.
factor_vs_final.optimization_principle: Diminishing returns within each bucket. Splitting investment between Factor and Final yields higher total damage than stacking one bucket.

base_scaling_types.attack_based: Uses weapon Attack stat. Affected by Weapon DMG%, Crit DMG%, Weakspot DMG%. Keywords: Shrapnel, Bounce, Fast Gunner.
base_scaling_types.psi_based: Uses armor PSI Intensity stat. Affected by Status DMG%, Elemental DMG%. Keywords: Burn, Frost Vortex, Power Surge, Unstable Bomber.

shrapnel.name: Shrapnel
shrapnel.effect_description: Hits deal +50% Attack as Weapon DMG to a random unhit body part
shrapnel.notes: Particularly effective against large enemies with multiple hitboxes

bounce.name: Bounce
bounce.effect_description: Bullets ricochet to nearby enemies after hitting target

scaling_mods.chain_bounce(renamed to something else c: +7.5% damage per bounce, up to +45% at 6 bounces
scaling_mods.boomerang_bullet: +2% trigger chance per Bounce hit, stacks 10x for 5s

power_surge.name: Power Surge
power_surge.effect_description: Instant shock damage + applies -40 Accuracy debuff for 6s

unstable_bomber.name: Unstable Bomber
unstable_bomber.effect_description: Triggers explosion after 0.1s dealing 100% PSI as Blast damage

burn.name: Burn
burn.formula: 0.12 × PSI × Stacks × (1 + Burn_Factor) × (1 + Burn_Final) × (1 + Status_DMG) × (1 + Blaze_Elemental)
burn.effect_description: DoT dealing 12% PSI per stack every 0.5s for 6s

frost_vortex.name: Frost Vortex
frost_vortex.effect_description: Creates AoE zone that slows and damages enemies

bulls_eye.name: The Bull's Eye
bulls_eye.formula: Target takes (1 + 0.08 + BullsEye_Vulnerability_Bonus) multiplier to ALL incoming damage
bulls_eye.effect_description: Marks target with blue outline, increasing damage taken by 8%
bulls_eye.notes: Amplifies both Weapon DMG and Status DMG builds equally

fortress_warfare.name: Fortress Warfare
fortress_warfare.effect_description: Stationary combat state granting +20% Weapon DMG and Super Armor
fortress_warfare.notes: Some mods trade Super Armor for additional damage (United We Stand: +15% Attack)

fast_gunner.name: Fast Gunner
fast_gunner.effect_description: Increases fire rate and attack damage, for each stack Fire Rate +1% and Attack +1% for 2s. Can stack up to 5 times.
fast_gunner.notes: Proc chance varies by weapon base stats
